review_summary: Inline arrow at JSX defeats useCallback. Plus useCallback rebuilds on multiplier change.

issues_found.title: Inline arrow defeats memo
issues_found.explanation: useCallback stabilizes onClick, but () => onClick(i.id) creates new fn each render. Item memo (if any) defeated.

broader_pattern: Wrapping stable refs in inline arrows defeats memo.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Inline arrow defeats memo; pass primitives.

review_summary: No cleanup. Plus mount per unmount leaks.

issues_found.title: Listener leak
issues_found.explanation: Unmount = listener persists.

issues_found.title: Can't remove
issues_found.explanation: Anonymous fn = can't unregister.
issues_found.verification: Verify DOM event on body. by reproducing the failing case, applying the fix, and adding a regression assertion.

broader_pattern: Named handlers for cleanup.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Cleanup discipline + named handler.

review_summary: Sequential awaits = waterfall. Unmount mid-chain = setState on unmounted.

issues_found.title: Waterfall
issues_found.explanation: Posts wait for user. Comments wait for posts. Could parallel where possible.

issues_found.title: State on unmounted
issues_found.explanation: Unmount during chain = setData fires anyway.

broader_pattern: Sequential await chains + no cancellation = bugs.
what_makes_this_review_senior: React Query dependent queries; cancellation built-in.

review_summary: Cast lies. name could be 'purple', returns undefined typed string.

issues_found.title: Cast bypasses check
issues_found.explanation: name typed string, cast to keyof. Runtime: undefined access.

broader_pattern: Casts lie. Validate or type at boundary.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Type predicate to narrow; typed parameter when caller controls.

review_summary: × character not announced as 'close'. No accessible name.

issues_found.title: No accessible name
issues_found.explanation: SR reads 'times' or skips. Doesn't know it's close.

broader_pattern: Icon-only buttons need aria-label.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Icon buttons need aria-label; aria-hidden on decorative icon.

review_summary: setState(fn) calls fn for lazy init. Need to wrap in another fn.

issues_found.title: setState calls action
issues_found.explanation: useState's setter with a function argument INVOKES it. setPendingAction(myFn) calls myFn instead of storing.

broader_pattern: setState with function: invokes. Wrap to store.
what_makes_this_review_senior: useState setter with fn arg = called. Functions in state need wrapping.

review_summary: Reset on success only. Failure leaves stale data + no error UI.

issues_found.title: Save failure silent
issues_found.explanation: If save throws, no error shown. User wonders if saved.

issues_found.title: Loses 'just saved' confirmation
issues_found.explanation: Could show 'saved!' before reset.

broader_pattern: Forms need success + error feedback.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Success + error feedback; toast pattern.

review_summary: JS animation for visual effect. CSS keyframe does this without re-renders.

issues_found.title: 60Hz re-render
issues_found.explanation: Each tick = React render. Skeleton on every list item × tick = many renders.

broader_pattern: CSS for visual-only animations.
what_makes_this_review_senior: CSS for visual animations; no React involvement.

review_summary: js-yaml is ~40KB. Loaded even for users who never use YAML feature.

issues_found.title: 40KB always
issues_found.explanation: Loaded for all users; used by < 1%.

broader_pattern: Rare features = lazy load.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Lazy on-demand for niche features.

review_summary: Network error loading chunk = no recovery. Suspense doesn't catch errors.

issues_found.title: Chunk load error unhandled
issues_found.explanation: Network failure or deploy-stale chunk = error thrown. Suspense doesn't catch.

broader_pattern: Always wrap lazy + Suspense in ErrorBoundary.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Lazy chunks fail; ErrorBoundary outside Suspense.

review_summary: Accessing dateRange.start safe but doesn't include dateRange ref. If dateRange is mutated externally, stale.

issues_found.title: Granular deps reasonable
issues_found.explanation: dateRange.start/end is the right granularity for primitives.
issues_found.fix: Verify Refetch on prop change. by reproducing the failing case, applying the fix, and adding a regression assertion.
issues_found.verification: Verify Refetch on prop change. by reproducing the failing case, applying the fix, and adding a regression assertion.

issues_found.title: Race
issues_found.explanation: Standard

issues_found.title: Standard
issues_found.explanation: Standard

broader_pattern: Primitive deps > object deps; use library for cancellation.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Primitive deps correct; React Query as canonical.

review_summary: Related state should be one object/reducer.

issues_found.title: Related state scattered
issues_found.explanation: Filters are related. One object would: simplify reset, serialization, reducer transitions.

issues_that_arent_issues: useState valid; this is a refactoring suggestion.
broader_pattern: Related state benefits from one object.
what_makes_this_review_senior: State organization; cohesion.

review_summary: No origin verification. Any page can postMessage.

issues_found.title: Accepts from any origin
issues_found.explanation: Any iframe (including malicious) can send navigation events.

broader_pattern: PostMessage handlers must verify origin.
what_makes_this_review_senior: PostMessage security: origin + data validation.

review_summary: window.innerWidth during render = SSR crash + mismatch.

issues_found.title: SSR crash
issues_found.explanation: Server has no window.

broader_pattern: Browser APIs in useEffect.
what_makes_this_review_senior: CSS over JS for responsive; SSR-safe.

review_summary: Inline script breaks with CSP. Plus interpolated env in script = XSS if env tampered.

issues_found.title: Blocked by CSP
issues_found.explanation: strict CSP forbids inline scripts without nonce.
issues_found.fix: External script with nonce, or external file

issues_found.title: XSS if env tampered
issues_found.explanation: If env has quotes, breaks JS.

broader_pattern: CSP-aware inline scripts; safe JSON in script.
what_makes_this_review_senior: CSP awareness; JSON.stringify for safe script interpolation.

review_summary: Custom comparator ignores theme. Theme change doesn't re-render.

issues_found.title: Theme changes ignored
issues_found.explanation: Comparator only checks user. Theme change = comparator returns true = skip render = stale color.

broader_pattern: Custom comparators must check ALL render-affecting props.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Custom comparator must be complete; default shallow is safer.

review_summary: No cleanup. Observer leaks. ref dep missing.

issues_found.title: Observer leak
issues_found.explanation: Unmount = observer alive.

issues_found.title: ref may not be set on mount
issues_found.explanation: Effect runs after mount, ref should be set. But if ref attached later... edge.

broader_pattern: Always cleanup observers.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Observer cleanup.

review_summary: Race if user rapid-clicks (between setLoading and disabled in DOM). Plus page stale closure.

issues_found.title: Stale page
issues_found.explanation: page captured at click time. If parent updates page, callback uses stale.

issues_found.title: Disabled lag
issues_found.explanation: setLoading async; click between is theoretical.
issues_found.verification: Verify Click-triggered fetch. by reproducing the failing case, applying the fix, and adding a regression assertion.

broader_pattern: Closures over state; functional updates.
what_makes_this_review_senior: useInfiniteQuery for pagination; mutation lifecycle.

review_summary: Return type lies. r.json() is any. No status check.

issues_found.title: r.json() any returned as User
issues_found.explanation: TypeScript trusts annotation. Runtime: anything.

issues_found.title: 4xx still parsed
issues_found.explanation: Standard

broader_pattern: Return types are claims, not validations.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Type annotation != runtime check; Zod at boundary.

review_summary: No aria-describedby. No aria-invalid. No role=alert. Error not associated with input.

issues_found.title: Error not associated
issues_found.explanation: SR doesn't connect error to input.

issues_found.title: Input not marked invalid
issues_found.explanation: SR doesn't know input has error.

issues_found.title: Color-only signal
issues_found.explanation: Color blind users miss error.

broader_pattern: Form errors: aria-describedby + aria-invalid + non-color signal.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Full form error a11y: aria-describedby + aria-invalid + role=alert + non-color.

review_summary: Rules of Hooks violation. Hooks must run same order each render.

issues_found.title: Rules of Hooks
issues_found.explanation: React expects hooks in same order. enabled toggle = hook order changes = bug.

broader_pattern: Hooks always run; conditions on output.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Rules of Hooks.

review_summary: No debounce. No cancellation. URL not encoded. No error handling. No uncontrolled value preservation.

issues_found.title: No debounce
issues_found.explanation: Search per keystroke = overload.

issues_found.title: Race
issues_found.explanation: Standard

issues_found.title: No URL encoding
issues_found.explanation: Special chars break URL

issues_found.title: User unaware
issues_found.explanation: Stale results during fetch

broader_pattern: Live search needs: debounce + cancel + encode + loading.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Live search full pattern via React Query + debounce.

review_summary: whileInView observes every section. For 50 sections = 50 IO observers. Plus stagger × 50 = 5s last.

issues_found.title: Many IO observers
issues_found.explanation: Per-section observer is expensive at scale.

broader_pattern: For many elements, CSS scroll-timeline > per-element IO.
what_makes_this_review_senior: CSS scroll-timeline for mass reveals; capped stagger; once: true.

review_summary: Loading 7 locales' JSON for one user. Should lazy-load by user locale.

issues_found.title: All locales shipped
issues_found.explanation: User in JA still ships en + es + fr + de + zh + ko.

broader_pattern: Locale data should be lazy by user locale.
what_makes_this_review_senior: i18next-http-backend for lazy locale loading.

review_summary: Two env checks may not be replaced together. Plus if fn throws, timeEnd never runs.

issues_found.title: Optimization fragility
issues_found.explanation: Tree-shaker may handle differently. Wrap once.

issues_found.title: timeEnd not called
issues_found.explanation: Throw between time/timeEnd leaves timer open.

broader_pattern: try/finally for resource cleanup.
what_makes_this_review_senior: try/finally for paired open/close; single env gate.
